nasb.text: And He remembered His covenant for their sake, And relented according to the greatness of His lovingkindness.

esv.text: For their sake he remembered his covenant, and relented according to the abundance of his steadfast love.

cnv.text: 他為他們的緣故記念他自己的約， 照著他豐盛的慈愛回心轉意。

ccb.text: 祂没有忘记与他们立的约， 因祂伟大无比的爱而怜悯他们。

csbs.text: 为他们的缘故，记念自己的约， 照着他丰盛的慈爱回心转意；
